Study results and measurements: Relative risk 1.24 (CI 95% 0.54 -2.84) Based on data from 3,941 participants in 7 studies. 1 (Randomized controlled)
Summary: There is probably little or no difference in the rate of serious adverse events with ASPY compared to other antimalarials.

Summary: Abnormal ALT increase is more frequent with ASPY compared to other antimalarials.
